title: PACK OF 5 Hanging Wardrobe Dehumidifier, Condensation Remover, Moisture Absorber, Dehumidifiers for Damp, Mould, Moisture in Wardrobe, Bedroom, Caravan, Bathroom, Basement - 210 g
features: Our hanging moisture absorber packets provide an easy solution to protecting items and fabrics from excess moisture, you will definitely be surprised how much water is collected in the bag after a few days, removing all the smelly moisture, dampness and humidity out of your rooms, wardrobes, cars, offices, warehouses etc
This Small and discreet wardrobe Dehumidifier improves air quality. Freshens air by eliminating musty odour caused by excess moisture. Protects clothes and items from excess moisture damage

The unique hydrophilic crystals are specifically formulated to draw and retain moisture from the air. This helps combat condensation, damp rooms, allergens in the air, mould, mildew and Neutralises odours
Ideal for rooms including kitchens, bathrooms, living rooms, bedrooms, basements, caravans, boats, garages or anywhere excess moisture is causing a problem

The first drop appears within 4-7 days depending on the humidity level. Absorbs up to 3 times its own weight in water it is recommended to be replaced every 6 Weeks, depending on the usage environment
